author: Tayeng, Aduk
imprint: Shillong: The Director of Information and Public Relations, Gov't of Arunachal Pradesh
title: Milang phrase book
notes: JP 7/14/97:  (Located in Mirish volume)  Seems like everything's been entered.  There's a wordlist from p. 4 to p. 89, and, as far as I can tell, the entirety has been entered.  It's organized by semantic field, and some transcription normalization has taken place:  ny -> IPA palatal nasal; j -> IPA voiced palatal fricative (inverted 'f').  Some morpheme boundaries have been put into database forms.
